site.name: AI Toolbox
site.tagline: Launch AI product demos in days, not weeks.
site.description: A multilingual AI tools hub with opinionated UX, ready to extend into production.

hero.title: Build a polished AI tools experience fast
hero.subtitle: Validate workflows, SEO structure, and localization on top of a robust Next.js foundation.

tool.title: Text Summarizer Demo
tool.description: Simulate AI summarization with deterministic success and failure paths for testing UX flows.
tool.mockSuccess: Success: This is a simulated AI summary output. Replace with real inference when wired to your backend.
tool.mockError: Generation failed. Please try again in a few moments.
tool.helperText: Type “trigger-error” to preview the error path.

examples.title: Example Use Cases
examples.description: Illustrative scenarios to validate the experience ahead of real integrations.

items.title: Marketing copy
items.description: Craft launch blurbs and press snippets ready for human polish.

items.title: Product research
items.description: Digest customer interviews into key takeaways.

items.title: Newsletter recaps
items.description: Transform long-form articles into shareable summaries.

features.title: Foundation Features
features.description: Ship confident MVPs with production-ready guardrails.

items.title: Locale-aware routing
items.description: Default English at root with Chinese at /zh, auto-detected and persisted.

items.title: SEO-ready metadata
items.description: Title, description, keywords, canonical, and hreflang ready for production.

items.title: Scalable tool cards
items.description: Configuration-driven layout ready to host future AI tasks and models.

blog.title: Latest Notes
blog.description: Content placeholders ready to swap in CMS-driven posts.

items.name: Design Snapshot
items.description: Iterate on hero and navigation styling.

footer.tagline: AI Toolbox — built for rapid experimentation and scale.

phases.name: Phase 1
phases.description: Deliver MVP with localization, SEO, and demo tool.

phases.name: Phase 2
phases.description: Add user accounts, billing, and analytics.

phases.name: Phase 3
phases.description: Expand content, knowledge base, and multilingual CMS.
